note: No games are scheduled for today, or today's slate hasn't been regenerated yet — showing the upcoming slate and yesterday's results.
basis: Updated to current, complete rosters — every 2026 player is now rated from her debut. This makes the board current, not necessarily more accurate: on the season so far the average-error change is too small to call a real accuracy gain.
source: our own pre-game model, on current complete rosters — the winning-margin call, the honest range around it, and the win chance
